overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of walking along a dark forest trail at night, illuminated by a flashlight or headlamp. The scene features a dirt path surrounded by grass and trees, with a wooden bench visible briefly on the right side.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows continuous first-person movement along a dark forest trail at night. The path is illuminated by a warm artificial light source, revealing dirt ground and grass on the sides. Dark tree lines flank both sides of the trail, and a wooden bench appears briefly on the right. No other characters or vehicles are present.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a secluded forest trail shrouded in the deep darkness of night. It begins with the camera moving forward along a dirt path, where a warm artificial light source cuts through the gloom to reveal patches of grass. As the movement persists, the beam of light sweeps across the dense, dark tree lines that flank both sides of the trail. The scene then shifts slightly as a wooden bench briefly emerges from the shadows on the right before the camera continues its steady progression into the void of the woods.
